post.summary: Compiles information about all administration areas available in the application,
post.description:
Compiles information about all administration areas available in the application,
in the form of a tree with root areas and subscreen structure.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

post.description: Compiles information about all DBHelper collections that are in use in the application.

parameters.name: apiVersion

post.description: API Method loaded from an external source folder.

post.summary: Gets information on all known countries available in the
post.description:
Gets information on all known countries available in the 
AppFramework TestSuite application, including their default locale and currency.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

post.summary: Retrieves a list of all known locales along with all
post.description:
Retrieves a list of all known locales along with all 
relevant details. This also shows which of the locales are
available for use in the application's user interface.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

parameters.name: appLocale
parameters.description: The application locale to use, as used for the AppTestSuite user interface. This determines the language in which translatable text is returned. If not provided, the system default locale, en_GB, is used.

post.summary: Returns the pre-generated OpenAPI 3.1 specification for all API methods as raw JSON.
post.description: Returns the pre-generated OpenAPI 3.1 specification for all API methods as raw JSON.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API Key used to authenticate the request.

parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

parameters.name: appLocale
parameters.description: The application locale to use, as used for the AppTestSuite user interface. This determines the language in which translatable text is returned. If not provided, the system default locale, en_GB, is used.

post.summary: A test API method to demonstrate dry run functionality.
post.description: A test API method to demonstrate dry run functionality.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If enabled, a dry run of the operation will be performed. The process will run as usual, but no actual changes will be made. Note: Any IDs and other data types returned will not correspond to real entities.

post.summary: A test method that always returns an error response.
post.description: A test method that always returns an error response.

parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

post.summary: This is a test API method to get country information.
post.description: This is a test API method to get country information.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

parameters.name: countryID
parameters.description: Application country ID.

parameters.name: countryISO
parameters.description: Two-letter country ISO code, e.g. `de` for Germany. Case insensitive.

post.summary: Stub Country Param Set API for testing purposes.
post.description: Stub Country Param Set API for testing purposes.

parameters.description: Application country ID.

parameters.name: countryISO
parameters.description: Two-letter country ISO code, e.g. `de` for Germany. Case insensitive.

x-validation-rules.label: Selecting the country
x-validation-rules.description: At least one of the following parameters must be provided: countryID, countryISO.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.description: API version to use. Defaults to the current version when omitted.

APIInfo.description: Metadata about the API method that handled the request.

methodName.description: The name of the API method that handled the request.

selectedVersion.description: The API version that was active for this request.

availableVersions.description: All versions supported by this API method.

description.description: The description of the API method.

requestMime.description: The MIME type of the request body.

responseMime.description: The MIME type of the response body.

requestTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the request was processed.

documentationURL.description: URL to the human-readable documentation for this method.

APIEnvelope.description: Standard success response envelope returned by all API methods.

data.description: The response payload. Structure varies per method.

APIErrorEnvelope.description: Standard error response envelope returned when an API method fails.

apiKey.description: API key passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
